title: Brotein TestFlight upload failed — transparent app icon + bad CFBundleDocumentTypes
html:
Brotein Xcode upload validation popped two errors: (1) the large app icon contained an alpha channel (Apple requires opaque), and (2) CFBundleDocumentTypes was not an array of dicts each with CFBundleTypeName. 6:31 a.m. — Yahir was up early shipping.

brotein · xcode · testflight · app store connect
